projects.title: mSpace - Insurance Mobile Application
projects.description:
Built comprehensive insurance management app for 100,000+ users with 99.5% uptime, developed 15+ reusable UI components, and implemented push notifications using React Native Firebase, boosting user engagement by 35%
Achieved 90%+ test coverage with Jest and optimized app performance with React.memo

projects.title: mRec - Agent Onboarding Mobile App
projects.description:
Built agent onboarding platform for Axis Max Life; integrated 10+ verification APIs (KYC, PAN, Aadhaar), cutting onboarding time by 60%
Delivered multi-step forms (React Hook Form), real-time tracking, and published to Play Store/App Store with TestFlight and Expo OTA updates

experience.description:
Building consumer-facing React Native apps for insurance/fintech: onboarding flows, KYC integrations, Redux state management, and production releases
Collaborating on architecture, testing, and deployment for iOS and Android

Developed and deployed production React Native apps for iOS/Android (100K+ users); managed Play Console and App Store releases (10+ deployments)
Built reusable component libraries, Jest test suites (85%+ coverage), and performance optimizations (lazy loading, code splitting) for 40% faster load time

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Information Technology
